rows.label: qev051004_MSG0001
rows.name:
Master's katanas are undoubtedly
masterworks! There's no way
this one is a failure...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051004_MSG0002
rows.name:
P-Please calm down, Master! To think of
cutting me down... that's too cruel...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051004_MSG0003
rows.name:
Master is a little eccentric, but as
a swordsmith, he is a legendary artisan
with no equal among the Lars.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051004_MSG0004
rows.name:
Even the Growth recognized his
skills, granting him special
treatment as a blacksmith.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051004_MSG0005
rows.name:
The dream katana sought by
such a man... I want to see
it with my own eyes soon, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051004_MSG0006
rows.name:
Master! What kind of mindset should I have
when stepping up to forge a katana?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051004_MSG0008
rows.name:
I wonder what kind of harsh life Master
must have lived to forge such heavy,
burning passion for the katana?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051004_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hmmm... A novice like me can't
even begin to imagine it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051004_MSG0010
rows.name:
The Adamantine Sword is finally
complete... Master went to the Black
Steel Continent to test its edge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051004_MSG0011
rows.name:
Please, travel to the Black Steel Continent as
well and bear witness to Master's valiant combat
skills and the sharpness of his blade.[ST:wait ]
